scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @don-sosa/api & npm run dev -w @don-sosa/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @don-sosa/core && npm run dev -w @don-sosa/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @don-sosa/core && npm run dev -w @don-sosa/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @don-sosa/core && npm run build -w @don-sosa/api && npm run build -w @don-sosa/web
